message:
fix(auth): add CSRF header to AuthCallback /auth/refresh call (#6925)

The AuthCallback component's POST /auth/refresh was missing the
X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest header required by the CSRF gate
(added in #6588). This caused a 403 Forbidden on every OAuth callback,
making login impossible.

The other /auth/refresh call site in lib/auth.tsx already sends this
header — AuthCallback was the only one missing it.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
